parameters.functionCode:
// Create test vendor data (10 vendors)
const testVendors = [
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_001',
    vendor_name: 'Test Drive Vendor',
    data_source_type: 'drive',
    tier_used: 1,
    source_url: 'test_folder_id_1',
    fallback_to_tier3: false
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_002',
    vendor_name: 'Test Dropbox Vendor',
    data_source_type: 'dropbox',
    tier_used: 1,
    source_url: 'test_folder_id_2',
    fallback_to_tier3: false
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_003',
    vendor_name: 'Test Sheets Vendor',
    data_source_type: 'sheets',
    tier_used: 1,
    source_url: 'test_sheet_id_1',
    fallback_to_tier3: false
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_004',
    vendor_name: 'Test Shopify Vendor 1',
    data_source_type: 'shopify',
    tier_used: 2,
    source_url: 'https://test-store-1.myshopify.com',
    fallback_to_tier3: true
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_005',
    vendor_name: 'Test Shopify Vendor 2',
    data_source_type: 'shopify',
    tier_used: 2,
    source_url: 'https://test-store-2.myshopify.com',
    fallback_to_tier3: true
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_006',
    vendor_name: 'Test Website Vendor 1',
    data_source_type: 'website',
    tier_used: 3,
    source_url: 'https://test-vendor-1.com',
    fallback_to_tier3: false
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_007',
    vendor_name: 'Test Website Vendor 2',
    data_source_type: 'website',
    tier_used: 3,
    source_url: 'https://test-vendor-2.com',
    fallback_to_tier3: false
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_008_broken',
    vendor_name: 'Test Broken Drive Vendor',
    data_source_type: 'drive',
    tier_used: 1,
    source_url: 'invalid_folder_id',
    fallback_to_tier3: false,
    _test_should_fail: true
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_009_broken',
    vendor_name: 'Test Broken Shopify Vendor',
    data_source_type: 'shopify',
    tier_used: 2,
    source_url: 'https://invalid-store.myshopify.com',
    fallback_to_tier3: false,
    _test_should_fail: true
  },
  {
    vendor_id: 'test_vendor_010',
    vendor_name: 'Test Mixed Vendor',
    data_source_type: 'sheets',
    tier_used: 1,
    source_url: 'test_sheet_id_2',
    fallback_to_tier3: false
  }
];

return testVendors.map(v => ({ json: v }));

nodes.name: Call Weekly Sync
